use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF ADULT PATIENTS WITH LOCALLY ADVANCED OR METASTATIC NON-SMALL CELL LUNG CANCER (NSCLC) WITH A REARRANGED DURING TRANSFECTION (RET) GENE FUSION, AS DETECTED BY AN FDA-APPROVED TEST

ADULT AND PEDIATRIC PATIENTS 2 YEARS OF AGE AND OLDER WITH LOCALLY ADVANCED OR METASTATIC SOLID TUMORS WITH A RET GENE FUSION THAT HAS PROGRESSED ON OR FOLLOWING PRIOR SYSTEMIC TREATMENT OR WHO HAVE NO SATISFACTORY ALTERNATIVE TREATMENT OPTIONS

TREATMENT OF ADULT OR PEDIATRIC PATIENTS 2 YEARS OF AGE OR OLDER WITH ADVANCED OR METASTATIC MEDULLARY THYROID CANCER (MTC) WITH A RET MUTATION, AS DETECTED BY AN FDA-APPROVED TEST, WHO REQUIRE SYSTEMIC THERAPY

TREATMENT OF ADULT OR PEDIATRIC PATIENTS 2 YEARS OF AGE OR OLDER WITH ADVANCED OR METASTATIC THYROID CANCER WITH A RET GENE FUSION, AS DETECTED BY AN FDA-APPROVED TEST, WHO REQUIRE SYSTEMIC THERAPY AND WHO ARE RADIOACTIVE IODINE-REFRACTORY

indications.text:
1.1 RET Fusion-Positive Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer
RETEVMO® is indicated for the treatment of adult patients with locally advanced or metastatic non-small cell lung cancer
(NSCLC) with a rearranged during transfection (RET) gene fusion, as detected by an FDA-approved test.
